# Mrinal Sinha

Canonical: https://themrinalsinha.com/

Entity-Type: Person

Name: Mrinal Sinha
Role: Software Engineer
Company: Paylocity
Location: India
Timezone: UTC+5:30

## Summary
Software engineer at Paylocity focused on backend architecture, distributed systems, and practical AI applications (LLM, RAG, agents). Builds production-grade systems with reliability and developer productivity in mind.

## Focus Areas
- Backend architecture
- Distributed systems
- AI applications (LLM, RAG, agents)
- API reliability and developer productivity
